dataset.question: Who were the eight authors of "Attention Is All You Need"?
dataset.ground_truth: Ashish Vaswani, Noam Shazeer, Niki Parmar, Jakob Uszkoreit, Llion Jones, Aidan Gomez, Łukasz Kaiser, and Illia Polosukhin.

dataset.question: What was the initial scaling factor for the key vectors (d_k) set to in the paper?
Which dataset was used to train the English-to-German translation model described in the paper?
dataset.ground_truth: the 2014 WMT English-German dataset consisting of nearly 4.5 million sentences derived from TED Talks and high-quality news articles.

dataset.question: How many NVIDIA P100 GPUs were used to train the base and big Transformer models?
What is the formula for positional encoding for even indices as described in the paper?
Which song by the Beatles inspired the title of the paper?
